payload.content: If you cannot identify a single bridging entity from the hop-1 summary, fall back to querying the most specific named entity in the claim itself (e.g., a film title, person name, or organization). Do not emit an empty query.

rationale: Edge-case rule for empty / weak hop-1 summaries. Probes whether explicit fallback policy reduces zero-retrieval failures on claims where hop-1 retrieves nothing useful.
